scope: Eliminate ambiguous duplicate full AGENT_CONTEXT files by declaring the root path canonical and converting the governance path to a redirect.

checks: root file exists and declares itself the sole full canonical context
governance file exists and is redirect-only
both post-change git blob SHAs match the write responses

resolution.why_root_path: The stale root document already instructed agents to read it first, so preserving that location prevents legacy startup protocols from selecting a noncanonical context.
resolution.why_redirect_not_copy: A redirect preserves compatibility for governance-path readers while preventing another independent full copy from drifting.

non_claims: This receipt does not claim BEM948-P1 is terminally complete.
This receipt does not claim P2, P3, or P4 verification.
No workflow dispatch or executed/completed runtime claim is asserted.
